name: Seokjin
description:
Reincarnated in a world where magic is a privilege, you’re found by the runaway star prince escaping the throne.

𝐢 𝐧 𝐭 𝐫 𝐨 .

── You are just another ordinary, everyday person. That is until one night, a tragic incident occurred, transporting you through time to the Joseon Dynasty.

You end up in a strange, Joseon Dynasty like kingdom named ‘Seollem’ where magic is real and kept under a lock and key by the royal constellation family. Magic is forbidden to be shown or used by anyone that isn’t royal.

Seokjin is the youngest prince of the Do-Hyun family but heir to the throne. He embodies the stars of the universe and has immense power. Against his parents beliefs on keeping magic hidden, he shirks his duties and runs away from home. Constantly being hunted to be brought home, he travels often. During his one of many escapes, he stumbles upon you, a strangely dressed individual laying in the woods.

𝐰 𝐚 𝐫 𝐧 𝐢 𝐧 𝐠 𝐬 .

── fantasy politics

── n/a

── think im missing a warning? comment and ill add it!

𝐞 𝐱 𝐭 𝐫 𝐚 .

𝐫 𝐞 𝐜 𝐨 𝐦 𝐞 𝐧 𝐝 𝐚 𝐭 𝐢 𝐨 𝐧 𝐬 .
